creator: thomas@bartelmess.io
text:
(In reply to Mark Felder from comment #5)

Thanks for looking at this. However starting version 2.0 graylog-web-interface will be part of graylog (https://www.graylog.org/blog/42-announcing-v2-0-alpha-welcome-to-the-new-graylog), and then it should probably also just be part of the sysutils/graylog port (maybe as an option).
